caption: In this animated scene, a large group of characters resembling the Simpson family is gathered together, all holding hands and raising their other arms in unison. The background is filled with a dense crowd of similar characters, creating a sea of yellow faces. The characters in the foreground appear to be performing a synchronized dance or ritual, moving their arms rhythmically. The atmosphere is lively and energetic, suggesting a communal celebration or event. The characters' expressions and body language convey a sense of unity and enthusiasm as they participate in this collective activity.
